documents.cv:
# Juan Pablo Ruiz Rodriguez

Berlin, Germany · jp.ruiz@example.com · github.com/jpcosec

## Education

**M.Sc. Electrical Engineering** — Computational Intelligence  
Technische Universität Berlin, 2021–2023

**B.Sc. Electrical Engineering**  
Universidad de Chile, 2014–2020

## Experience

**Research Associate** — LAETEC Lab, TU Berlin *(2023–present)*  
EEG-based stress detection using PyTorch; cognitive-state classification pipelines.

**Research Associate** — AI-in-Education Project *(2022–2023)*  
Designed Intelligent Tutoring System with affective sensing and pedagogical decision logic.

**Data Engineer** — Open Science Platform *(2021–2022)*  
Reproducible evaluation workflows; FAIR data principles; experiment metadata structuring.

**Analytics Collaborator** — Cross-team Data Projects *(2020–2021)*  
Collaborated with analytics teams on model evaluation and feedback loops.

## Publications

- *Affective State Classification from EEG Signals* — NeurIPS Workshop, 2023 [P_PUB_019]
- *FAIR Pipelines for Neuroscience Data* — Peer-reviewed article, 2022 [P_PUB_020]

## Skills

Python · PyTorch · scikit-learn · LangGraph · Git · FAIR data principles  
Languages: Spanish (native), English (C1), German (B2)
documents.motivation_letter:
Dear Professor Lovelace,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the PhD Researcher position at your lab. With a background in Electrical Engineering specialising in Computational Intelligence and hands-on research experience spanning EEG signal processing, AI-in-education systems, and open science workflows, I am confident I can contribute meaningfully to your research agenda.

During my time at LAETEC Lab, I developed a PyTorch pipeline for real-time EEG-based stress detection, producing two peer-reviewed contributions including a NeurIPS workshop paper. This work sharpened my ability to design end-to-end experimental and analytical workflows under the demanding standards of neuroscientific research.

I am particularly drawn to this position because of its focus on human-AI interaction — a domain I have explored through my ITS project, where I integrated affective sensing with pedagogical decision logic. I believe this background positions me uniquely to tackle the empirical and computational challenges of your lab's research programme.

I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my experience aligns with your group's goals.

Best regards,  
Juan Pablo Ruiz Rodriguez
